title: modular-arithmetic-clock widget params
description: Visualizes arithmetic in Z/n on a circular dial of n equally-spaced points labeled 0..n-1. Two interaction modes selected by `kind`: 'addition' draws the chained walk 0 → a → (a+b) mod n with sliders for a and b; 'multiplication' draws every k → (k·a) mod n arrow and reports gcd(a,n) plus the cycle structure with sliders for a and n. The widget emits an empty host div; at runtime the page-global library `MVModularArithmeticClock` (js/widget-modular-arithmetic-clock.js) builds chrome (header, sliders, SVG, readout) via `MVModularArithmeticClock.init('#widgetId', config)`. A portable frontend can ignore renderScript and reimplement the dial from `kind + params` alone.

widgetId.description: DOM id for the host `<div class="widget">`.

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox for the dial (defaults to '0 0 320 320').

kind.description: Selects the dial mode. 'addition' shows a + b in Z/n as a chained walk; 'multiplication' shows the map k -> a·k mod n as an arrow bundle and reports gcd / cycle length.

params.description: Initial slider values. Missing keys fall back to library defaults. For both kinds: `n` (modulus, integer ≥ 2). For `addition`: `a`, `b` (operands, integers in [0, n-1]). For `multiplication`: `a` (multiplier, integer in [0, n-1]).

n.description: Modulus — number of points on the dial.

b.description: Second addend (addition only; ignored when kind = 'multiplication').

sectionComment.description: ARTIFACT. Optional banner comment preserved when migrating sources.
